## CustomTypeRegistration.toJsonSchema property

Converts the custom type's payload into a JSON Schema fragment.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly toJsonSchema: (payload: ExtensionPayloadValue, vendorPrefix: string) => Record<string, unknown>;
```
